Title: Valid login
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter valid username 3. Enter valid password 4. Click login
Expected Result: User should be logged in and redirected to products page

Title: Invalid login with wrong password
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter valid username 3. Enter wrong password 4. Click login
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed and login should fail

Title: Login with trailing space in username
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter username with trailing space 3. Enter valid password 4. Click login
Expected Result: System should handle input correctly (currently login fails)

Title: Invalid login with wrong username
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter wrong username 3. Enter valid password 4. Click login
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed and login should fail

Title: Invalid login with wrong username and password
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter wrong username 3. Enter wrong password 4. Click login
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed and login should fail

Title: Login with empty fields
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Leave username and password empty 3. Click login
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed and login should fail

Title: Add product to cart
Steps: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click 'Add to cart' on a product
Expected Result: Product should be added to cart, button should change to 'Remove', cart icon count should increase by 1

Title: Remove product from cart
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Click 'Remove' button
Expected Result: Product should be removed, button should change back to 'Add to cart', cart count should decrease

Title: Add multiple products to cart
Expected Result: All selected products should be added, cart icon should reflect correct count

Title: Verify cart page items
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product 3. Click cart icon
Expected Result: Cart page should display correct product(s), name, price and quantity

Title: Verify product quantity in cart
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Open cart page
Expected Result: Product quantity should be fixed at 1 and no option to modify quantity should be available

Title: Checkout with valid details
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Open cart 4. Click Checkout 5. Enter valid first name, last name and postal code 6. Click Continue
Expected Result: User should proceed to checkout overview page

Title: Checkout with empty required fields
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Open cart 4. Click Checkout 5. Leave fields empty 6. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error message should be displayed and user should remain on checkout information page

Title: Checkout with invalid characters in name fields
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Open cart 4. Click Checkout 5. Enter numbers or symbols in first name/last name 6. Click Continue
Expected Result: System should reject invalid name input or display validation error

Title: Checkout with invalid postal code format
Steps: 1. Login 2. Add product to cart 3. Open cart 4. Click Checkout 5. Enter alphabetic or overly long postal code 6. Click Continue
Expected Result: System should reject invalid postal code or display validation error
